intro.title: Hello and Welcome to My Website!
intro.description: Hey, I'm Max. This site is where everything I make ends up. The code lives here along with the research papers, the games, the music, and that financial project I probably spend too much time on. My resume sits right below this. And the dock on the edge of the screen holds fifty themes. Each one changes the colors, fonts, shadows, and even the little weather moving in the background. Pick whatever feels right today.

programming.title: 💻 Website Programming Work
programming.description: Nothing here is a screenshot. The site you are standing in is the actual exhibit. Every terminal below reads the real files that run this page right now, including the themes, the viewers, the market pulse script, and the CI that keeps the numbers fresh. Click any terminal to read the full source.
programming.credit: All of it ships from a public repo. If a piece of this site ends up in yours, a small credit link back genuinely means a lot. Build on it, just don't lift it whole.

posts.title: 📁 Articles & Posts
posts.description: Papers, write-ups, and older school work. Everything opens right here on the page. Longer project updates and professional commentary usually land on LinkedIn first, so for the running version follow
posts.generalDescription: The main shelf: school works, research papers, the channel, and the band, in their intended reading order.

finance.title: 💸 The Financial Liberty Project
finance.description: Money research I actually stand behind. Every figure is dated, every shaky claim gets a flag, and nothing gets rounded into a prettier story.

arcade.title: 🕹️ Games & Projects Arcade
arcade.description: This is the playable shelf. The pixel studio works instantly right here on the page. Everything else waits until you click the big emoji. It tries to show a preview first, and there is always an open in new tab option because some hosts refuse to play inside a frame.

individualism.title: 🧭 Individualism
individualism.description: Personality assessments, taken seriously and shown in full. I sat the 300-item IPIP myself, and the plan is to run the same battery through several AI models and post each profile as its own poster. Tap any card to open the full report right here. Read it, scroll it, close it. No downloads from this window, though the source is in the public repo if you go looking.

connect.title: 🌳 Connect
connect.description: The tree is real. Every glowing node links somewhere useful, including LinkedIn, GitHub, YouTube, and Handshake. The trunk goes to my Linktree, which always stays current. Email and phone sit just below if you would rather talk to a person.

projects.title: 📺 Official YouTube Channel
projects.description: Project walk-throughs, build logs, and demos. The channel is live and content is coming.

projects.title: 🏫 Junior to High School Haas Hall Works
projects.description: My early programming works from Haas Hall Academy.

projects.title: 🎓 University of Arkansas Works
projects.description: Projects and coursework from the University of Arkansas.

projects.title: 🔧 Northwest Technical Institute Works
projects.description: Technical projects from Northwest Technical Institute which caused the file size to be too big.

projects.title: 🎷 Jazz-Fusion / Progressive Rock Band
projects.description: Compositions and sessions are in the works. Recordings will land here and on the YouTube channel.

projects.title: ⚙️ The Paths to Hardware-Based Income
projects.description: A field survey of earning with machines you own: ASIC mining, DePIN networks, agentic trading rigs, and home-scale personal data centers. Where the money actually is in 2026, what the power and hardware really cost, and the honest risk on each path.

projects.title: 🥩 NWA Meat & Plant Sourcing
projects.description: Where Northwest Arkansas food actually comes from. A research paper plus a working field guide to local meat and plant sourcing, covering farms, processors, seasons, and the honest economics of eating close to home.

projects.title: 🔧 Northwest Technical Institute Works 1/2
projects.description: Attempting to split NWTI Works in half to see if it's previewable like HHAB & UofA Works. Pages 1–163, rendered page by page in the on-site reader.

projects.title: 🔧 Northwest Technical Institute Works 2/2
projects.description: Another attempt at splitting NWTI Works in half (this is the other half) to see if it's previewable like HHAB & UofA Works. Pages 164–214, rendered page by page in the on-site reader.

projects.title: 💼 Project Blogs & Professional Updates
projects.description: Long-form write-ups and career updates publish on LinkedIn first. Follow along there.

clawmaxxing.title: 🦞 The Clawmaxxing Project
clawmaxxing.description: Local-first, multi-agent AI that owns its intelligence instead of renting it: quantized open-weights models on hardware I control, wired into robots, glasses, drones, and holograms, all under encryption on a private mesh. Each node has its own research paper now, every one written to standard format with 100+ cited sources. They open in the reader here, no downloads.

papers.title: 🦞 Local-First AI Hub
papers.description: The brain of the whole system: quantized open-weights LLMs on a dedicated Ubuntu mini-PC orchestrating specialist agents for content, security, dev, investing, and marketing, with zero cloud dependency, LUKS encryption, and a Tailscale mesh. Two papers: the integrated architecture, and the design-science case study behind it.

docs.label: The Council in the Basement (Case Study)

papers.title: 🐕 Robot Dog
papers.description: A SunFounder PiDog V2 quadruped running a 30-billion-parameter model on a single-board computer for first-person vision, navigation, and natural-language control, and the case for accessible, local-first embodiment over extractive companion AI.

papers.title: 🛡️ CybersecurityClaw
papers.description: A Kali Linux security laptop federated into the agent mesh (Bash Bunny, Flipper Zero, high-gain Wi-Fi audits, YubiKey MFA) for AI-assisted, human-gated red-team and defensive work on hardware I own and control.

papers.title: 🕶️ Smart Glasses
papers.description: Meta Ray-Ban smart glasses relaying a live first-person feed to local vision models: ambient AI presence without a cloud call. A full history and technical analysis, from military head-mounted displays to locally-intelligent consumer eyewear.

papers.title: ♻️ RetroClawing
papers.description: Reviving dead phones and forgotten laptops into working AI terminals: the most honest proof that local-first beats renting from the cloud is when e-waste becomes useful again. A review and position paper on device repurposing, e-waste, and digital equity.

papers.title: 🔮 Hologram
papers.description: A Looking Glass light-field display driving a lip-synced embodied avatar for the hub, and a research-through-design study of a fully local embodied conversational agent on consumer hardware.

papers.title: 🚁 Drone
papers.description: A Holybro X650 build (Pixhawk 6X, Jetson Orin NX running a fully onboard quantized LLM, OAK-D depth camera) for autonomous flight with zero cloud dependency, and link independence as a design criterion for onboard LLM cognition on an uncrewed aircraft.

assessments.title: IPIP-300 — Maximiliano Garcia
assessments.subtitle: My own profile across the Big Five, item by item
assessments.detail: The full 300-item IPIP-NEO, taken by me and rendered as a five-dimension poster: Extraversion, Agreeableness, Conscientiousness, Neuroticism, and Openness, each broken into its six facets. Open it to read the whole thing.

arcade.title: 🎨 Pixel Art Studio Max
arcade.description: A pixel studio right in the page. Pick a color, paint, undo, and save your art as a PNG. No loading.

arcade.title: Shuffle Rush
arcade.description: Frutiger Metro rhythm action, live on itch.io. Built with Rosebud.ai and Phaser 3.

arcade.title: SkyDisorder
arcade.description: Satirical single-file Canvas 2D arcade golf. Over 12K lines, census-verified, with four phases complete.

arcade.title: Getting Through
arcade.description: A 3D parody fighter in pre-production on a Unity and Godot 4 stack, targeting itch.io and Roblox.

arcade.title: Keystone
arcade.description: A 130K-line local-first AI agent platform in Rust, Tauri, and React. Agents on your hardware, under your keys.

arcade.title: Flock Finance
arcade.description: Blockchain-powered decentralized exchange concept for tokenized multi-investment vehicles, and the home of the SaaS master portfolio. The feasibility research and project plan are below.

arcade.title: Biotank
arcade.description: Closed-loop bio-digester tank system. The feasibility study and project management plan are drafted, and prototyping is next.

arcade.title: DiamondDrive
arcade.description: Gamified habit-and-goal drive system. The research paper and project plan are complete, and the prototype is in the shop.

arcade.title: Winnow
arcade.description: A client-side, zero-dependency web app for swipe-based social network triage and ranking. Version 1.0.0-rc.1. The Overgrown Feed essay and the project plan are below.

arcade.title: Create Your Own Maxfolio
arcade.description: Full-stack networking parody site built on Next.js, Tailwind, Supabase, and Vercel.

arcade.title: NWAero Grid Dashboard
arcade.description: Regional weather and traffic dashboard with real-time API aggregation. A collab build.

arcade.title: Coding Terminal Collective
arcade.description: Terminal coding collective with DevOps tooling, refactored from the academic repo.

music.note: Playlist manifest. The player loops a single track, or advances through several with the ⏭ dock button. Visitors can add their own file via 🎧 in any audio format their browser decodes. It joins the rotation locally and is never uploaded.

tracks.note: Commercial recording. The licensing flag is recorded in assets/music/README.md; shipped at Max's explicit, documented call.

tracks.note: Fan-made lo-fi remix. Licensing flag applies (see assets/music/README.md).

milestones.label: 50 Living Themes
milestones.detail: Every theme swaps fonts, shadows, gradients, background motion, and its own particle weather. Click me to borrow another theme's colors.
milestones.sub: Fonts, shadows, gradients, and the weather in the air all swap with every switch.

milestones.label: Financial Liberty Research
milestones.detail: Ten research works with dated figures, honesty flags, and a Top 50 market pulse that refreshes itself.
milestones.sub: Ten dated research works with honesty flags and a Top 50 market pulse.

milestones.detail: A pixel studio you can paint in right now, shipped games, and an arcade of builds in flight.
milestones.sub: A paintable pixel studio, shipped games, and an arcade of builds in flight.

milestones.sub: Agents that own their intelligence instead of renting it. Papers in generation.
